query: SELECT categoria, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tipoAcao ORDER BY tipoAcao SEPARATOR ' | ') as tipos_acao FROM conhecimentos GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY total DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT categoria, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tipoAcao ORDER BY tipoAcao SEPARATOR ' | ') as tipos_acao FROM conhecimentos GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY total DESC;
